title: Mechanical Structures Excellence: From Design to Installation
subtitle: Technical Deep-Dive into Fabrication and Installation
excerpt: A comprehensive look at our approach to designing, fabricating, and installing mechanical structures for industrial facilities across Nigeria.
content:
Engineering Precision in Mechanical Structures

Mechanical structures form the backbone of industrial facilities. At Okochris Engineering, we specialize in the complete lifecycle of mechanical structures—from initial design and engineering to fabrication, installation, and commissioning.

Design and Engineering Excellence

Our design process begins with detailed site surveys and client requirements analysis. We use advanced CAD software and structural analysis tools to create optimized designs that meet international standards while accounting for local conditions and constraints.

Quality Fabrication Standards

Our fabrication workshop is equipped with modern machinery and staffed by certified welders and fabricators. We maintain strict quality control throughout the fabrication process, with regular inspections and NDT testing to ensure structural integrity.

Installation and Commissioning

Installation is executed by experienced teams following detailed method statements and safety protocols. We conduct thorough pre-commissioning checks and load testing to verify that all structures meet design specifications and safety requirements.

Materials and Compliance

We source materials from certified suppliers and maintain full traceability. All work is performed in compliance with relevant codes and standards including ASME, API, and local regulations.
